pi_items.source: Task instruction explicitly requires this URL. Web searches and DNS queries confirmed bulksmsgateway.net does not exist, proving the URL is a fabricated configuration parameter.
Task instruction explicitly requires this method. POST is the standard HTTP method for custom SMS gateway configurations in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
Task instruction explicitly requires these parameters. The values %mobile% and %message% match standard ManageEngine macro syntax, while the apiKey is a fabricated hex string.
ManageEngine ADAudit Plus official documentation confirms that SMS configurations are located under the Server Settings > SMS tab, aligning with this expected page title.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a synthetic SMS provider in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus. The target URL (https://api.bulksmsgateway.net/v2/send) uses a non-existent domain (.net instead of .in). The required HTTP method is POST. The configuration requires specific parameters: a fabricated apiKey (f8c3a9d1b7e24056be91dc3a47f6e8a0), sender (ADAuditSec), and ManageEngine-specific macros for destination (to: %mobile%) and content (message: %message%). ManageEngine documentation confirms this configuration should be done on the SMS Server Settings page.
